method_1_groq_en.transcript: This Kachori was being sold by Jeeyan Bhai at Jeeyan Kachori Centre. To increase the business, he hired an influencer named Dora Bhai. Dora Bhai gave him this type of reel. As the performance of the reel was good, Jeeyan Bhai asked Dora Bhai to do partnership ads of this type. Hearing this, Dora Bhai thought that doing partnership ads will benefit the business because the business will get the face of the influencer and the audience. But what is the benefit of this? So he went to his friend Ninja Marketing Services. So Ninja Bhai advised him that yes, you should do partnership ads. Because the way business's partnership ads increase sales, similarly Dora Bhai will get data that how much sale is coming from ads and he will know his brand value. Because in industry, most of the top creators' audience is fragmented and that is overpaid and small creators whose audience is niche is underpaid.
method_1_groq_en.notes: Forces Whisper to output in English letters

method_1_groq_en.transcript: This is the Pataka that Jeeyan ji is selling at Jeeyan Pataka Centre. To grow the business, he hired Nobita and Sunyo. They published a lot of custom templates and asked them to distribute them among the people. So Nobita ji got her own custom template and Sunyo ji got her own custom template. Nobita ji worked very hard. Outside the school, playground, outside the market, he was aware of everyone that you should buy a Pataka from Jeeyan Pataka Centre. What did Sunyo do? He sat outside of Jihan's shop 100 meters away. And those who were going to buy the same product, he just gave his code that if you give this code, you will get an additional discount. Next month, when Jihan was checking the result of his campaign, more codes were redeemed by Sunyo and less codes by Nobita. So he fired Nobita. After some time, Jihan's business kept falling because he fired the one who was working hard. This teaches us that your focus should be on incrementality rather than attribution. In our case, the sale that Sunyo Ji was doing and the sale that came from him was not going to come anyway. But the sale that Nobita Ji was doing and the sale that came from him was additional sales for Jihan Ji's brand.
method_1_groq_en.notes: Forces Whisper to output in English letters

method_3_simple_map.transcript_hindi: इस पटाके को बेच रहे हैं जियान जी, जियान पटाका सेंटर पे बिजनेस को ग्रो करने के लिए इनोंने हायर किया नोबीता और सुन्यो को इनोंने बहुत सारे कस्टम पेमप्लेट चपाए और बोला के भाई लोगों में बाटो तो नोबिता जी को अपना custom template मिला और सुन्यो जी को अपना custom template नोबिता जी ने बहुत मेहनत की ये school के बाहर, playground के बाहर, market के बाहर सब को aware करते जा रहे थे कि जियान पटाका center से आप पटाका लीजे सुनियो ने क्या किया जियान जी की दुकान के बाहर 100 मेटर के बाहर वो बैठ गए और जो लोग वैसे ही प्रड़क खरीदने वाले थे उनको बस अपना कोड दे दिया कि ये कोड देना तो आपको मिलेगा एडिशनल डिसकाउंट next month जियान जी जब अपना campaign का result check कर रहे थे तो जादा codes सुन्यो जी के redeem हुए और नोबिता के कम codes redeem हुए तो इन्होंने नोबिता को fire कर दिया कुछ time बाद जियान जी का business गिरता गया क्योंकि जो जादा मेहनत कर रहा था उसको तो इन्होंने fire कर दिया इससे हमें ये सीख मिल दिये कि आपका फोकस attribution से ज़्यादा incrementality पे होना चाहिए हमारे case में सुनियो जी जो marketing कर रहे थे और उससे जो sale आया वो तो anywhere आनही वाला था लेकिन नोबिता जी जो marketing कर रहे थे और उससे जो sale आया वो जियान जी की brand के लिए additional sales था
